meanings.definition: a crosspiece between the legs of a chair
one of the crosspieces that form the steps of a ladder
make (bells) ring, often for the purposes of musical edification
examples: My uncle rings every Sunday at the local church

meanings.definition: get or try to get into communication (with someone) by telephone
examples: I tried to call you all night
Take two aspirin and call me in the morning

meanings.definition: extend on all sides of simultaneously; encircle
attach a ring to the foot of, in order to identify
examples: band the geese to observe their migratory patterns
